prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-DRILLBITS-7517SB35-IR-TT Product Type: FASTENER_DRIVE_BIT Brand (from catalog): ToolTreaux Existing Title: ToolTreaux 34pc Chrome Vanadium Tamper Proof Security Bit and Magnetizer Set Description: The ToolTreaux magnetic bit set comes with 34 assorted drill bit types and sizes, ideal for a variety of projects. Each bit features a magnetic tip that will hold and secure small screws while you're working to prevent slippage. Never lose a tiny screw again with this magnetic drill bit set.

Our drill bits are made of high-quality chrome vanadium steel that won't rust so you can count on them for many uses. They have an anti-theft tamper-proof design so that the bits can't be interfered with or changed easily.

The bits come with a lightweight storage case to keep them organized and secure when not in use. Use the case to transport them easily and store them inside of your toolbox, tool belt, or craft storage container.

Magnetic drill bits are great tools for a variety of projects including automotive repair, electronics repair, metalworking, jewelry making, home improvement, watch repair, and more. These are must-have tools for hobbyists and craftsmen alike. Search Terms: drill bit set drill bits drill bit sharpener magnetic bit holder magnetic drill bit set metal drill bits for steel home improvement items tools and home improvement watch repair kit watch repair tools and kits tools power tools hand tools drill bits Features: - MAGNETIC BIT SET - ToolTreaux magnetic bit set comes with 34 assorted drill bit sizes and types. Each bit features a magnetic tip to hold and secure small screws to prevent slippage - never lose a tiny screw again - TAMPER-PROOF CONSTRUCTION - Drill bits are made of high-quality chrome vanadium steel that won't rust; Anti-theft design ensures bits can't be interfered with or changed easily - LIGHTWEIGHT STORAGE CASE - Bits come with lightweight storage case to keep your tools organized and secure when not in use; Transport them easily and store inside any standard tool box, tool belt or craft storage container - VERSATILE TOOLS - Drill bits and magnetizer set are ideal for automotive repair, electronics repair, jewelry making, home improvement and maintenance, watch repair and more. Must-have tools for craftsmen, hobbyists and metalworkers - SPECIFICATIONS - Material: chrome vanadium steel, plastic; Dimensions: 9.12" x 4.77" x 1.9"; Weight: 1.76lbs (28.16oz); Colors: chrome, black, yellow; Number of pieces: 34 === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ToolTreaux 34pc Magnetic Tamper Proof Security Drill Bit Set
